{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322043629A7A0C6E9F7765D727693\"}"},"total":2510},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7130097890194375460","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超精彩，小有瑕疵，忽略不计。精彩不断，值得挑灯夜战。实实在在的爽文，主要是作者大大文笔好。同样是重生文人家写的就是不一样的好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660105364,"group_id":"7100913308865137700","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4uUBMqbyjdoe/+hgJAkVQzIzWMOjvUu9iTgDbRWg7v0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776700848\u0026x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"3597200759984375","user_name":"不动声色的紫韵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3597200759984375","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7100913308865137700","book_info":{"abstract":"吴天宇没想到自己也能重生，看过许多重生小说，盼望着自己也能重生一次，这次竟然真的重生了，而且还是在八十年代，这个刚改革开放的年代。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ae66b3c819edb26668d8358a864116cf","author":"北雁飞舞","author_id":"","book_id":"7100913308865137700","book_name":"1985：从倒卖香烟开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":263,\"name\":\"都市种田\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263\u0026name=都市种田\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"sch "relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"517","tags":"都市种田,都市,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6e3c2eda430508802ace8bff614f5838~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779309389\u0026x-signature=bkk2SlmeUcDuNKFnzBxolzZ1VFc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2190681607519412","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.40464982e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322043629A7A0C6E9F7765D727693\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读89小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":180420,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":320883,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":10831},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1691535223,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7537361755277361944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"重生小说，看过太多，这一部能排前2！一个普通人重生，又没有系统金手指异能和过目不忘，不可能记得太多事情，猪脚从最开始只想老婆孩子热炕头的小富即安，到后面事情顺遂越做越大的责任感，都不是一蹴即成的，猪脚记得清楚的事情就多写，不是很清晰的事情就把握大方向，让专业的事情交给专业的人去做，这样就避免了太多的多写多错，而且两世为人也看透了很多人，又避免了太多的人情世故的复杂性而越写越让人厌烦！这是我心目中的普通人重生后的样子！  我去打赏！！！！","text_exts":[{"e":67,"s":60,"text":"老婆孩子热炕头","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E8%80%81%E5%A9%86%E5%AD%A9%E5%AD%90%E7%83%AD%E7%82%95%E5%A4%B4\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741253895D727693%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227537361755277361944%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227100913308865137700%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%80%81%E5%A9%86%E5%AD%A9%E5%AD%90%E7%83%AD%E7%82%95%E5%A4%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754938180,"group_id":"7100913308865137700","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0eAqeKtd0uq5cWPY9Uu2ozGSlLR/R4Vwd4coZbXYB0B","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776704205\u0026x-signature=yZBRyurrKDTyW8Ks9x781%2BPALhc%3D","user_id":"2189867633875981","user_name":"苛刻的老书虫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2189867633875981","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7100913308865137700","book_info":{"abstract":"吴天宇没想到自己也能重生，看过许多重生小说，盼望着自己也能重生一次，这次竟然真的重生了，而且还是在八十年代，这个刚改革开放的年代。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ae66b3c819edb26668d8358a864116cf","author":"北雁飞舞","author_id":"","book_id":"7100913308865137700","book_name":"1985：从倒卖香烟开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_cou
